codeReview.summary: The sync history view (VAL-UI-009) is fully implemented across all layers: main-process database query with filtering/pagination, IPC bridge, TypeScript typings, and a polished React panel integrated into SyncSettingsPage. The feature matches the expectedBehavior in features.json and the validation contract assertion VAL-UI-009.

summary: Feature F018-UI passes review. The SyncHistoryPanel reads from sync_log, supports chronological display, filtering by date/module/direction/status, and pagination. Typecheck, lint, and build passed. No blocking or non-blocking issues were found.
